name: Slush
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the water and sugar until dissolved.
2. Allow mixture to cool to touch.
3. Add orange juice, lemonade, vodka, gin, or rum.
4. Stir well.
5. Place in freezer and let sit overnight.
6. In the morning, stir again.
7. When ready to serve, fill a glass 1/2 to 3/4 full with mixture.
8. Top off with 7 UP or Gingerale. Very Good.
